facebook.caption:
907 reviews. 4.7 stars. On a noodle shop. In Phu Quoc.

Mì Tê - Artisan Noodles on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is not flying under the radar anymore, and for good reason. Handcrafted noodles, serious broth, and the kind of bowl that makes you cancel your beach plans and order a second one.

Add this to your Phu Quoc food list before the crowds figure it out.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the noodles land in the bowl. That broth color alone. Mì Tê - Artisan Noodles has 907 reviews at 4.7 stars, and one visit tells you exactly why. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Go.
